title: Fresh Apple Cake with Caramel Frosting
ingredients: ¼ tsp each cloves and nutmeg
½ cup butter, softened at room temp and cut into 12 pieces

Melt butter in small saucepan until starting to brown. Stir in brown sugar and salt. Stir over medium heat until sugar mels. Add milk and bring to a boil. Pour into mixing bowl and cool 10 minutes. Add powdered sugar and vanilla and beat until spreading consistency. Add more powdered sugar if needing to thicken. Frost cake. Sprinkle chopped walnuts on top.
instructions: Blend butter until smooth. Add sugar and eggs and beat well. Combine flour, baking soda, salt, and spices together. Add dry ingredients to butter mixture, blend until just combined. Stir in apples and nuts. Pour into a greased and floured 9X13 inch pan. Bake at 325 degrees F for 45-50 minutes. Cool completely and frost with Caramel Frosting.
